citations.description: Ticket `show_ticket` response: `status: in_progress`, `comments: []` — no attestation of a live run recorded.
E2e test uses a synthetic partial epic + injected gold-set answers, not a live rebar plan-review run.
Monitoring section documents HOW to audit, but contains no actual run output or documented 'none qualified' case from a live review.

findings.criterion: A re-fired epic/story plan-review demonstrably runs the floor (a drop appears in the sidecar, or a documented case shows none qualified) without changing any PASS/BLOCK verdict.
findings.detail: No live re-fired plan-review evidence exists in the repository. The ticket has no comments, no sidecar output file with `drop_reason="completion"` entries, and no documented 'none qualified' case from a real run with `completion_floor_active = true`. The e2e test (`tests/unit/test_completion_floor_e2e.py`) exercises the floor logic in a synthetic/gold-set context but is not a live re-fired plan-review of an actual epic or story. The ticket status is still `in_progress` and `comments: []`. The criterion explicitly requires 'demonstrably runs' — either a sidecar drop or a documented case — neither is present.
findings.remediation: Run `rebar review-plan <epic-or-story-id>` on a re-fired container ticket with `completion_floor_active = true` in effect, then document the result (sidecar output showing a drop, or an explicit statement that no findings qualified for the floor) in `docs/calibration/completion_floor.md` or as a ticket comment with the specific review run id, observed outcome, and timestamp.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
